title: lathyrus maritimus f. pubescens
intro: Lathyrus maritimus f. pubescens is a variety of the Beach Pea plant, a flowering plant native to coastal areas of Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its diuretic effects. The plant's seeds and leaves have been used to create herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, making it a subject of interest in modern herbal medicine.
